name: Vegetable Dip (Puerto Rico)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise and sour cream.
2. Stir in the garlic powder, parsley flakes, seasoned salt, and dill seed until well mixed.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or overnight for best flavor.
4. Serve chilled with an assortment of raw vegetables such as celery, carrots, cucumbers, bell peppers, cauliflower, etc., cut into bite-sized pieces.
